suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify `worker-cli` procedure for low-risk non-functional cleanups (e.g., comment/string-only fixes): allow a reduced path that skips mandatory tests-first red phase and explicit `cargo build`, while still requiring targeted verification and clear deviation reporting.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fix reviews (`fix-endpoint-canonical-residual-ref`, `fix-config-requires-dir-not-just-exists`) flagged procedural mismatch between strict skill steps and observed practical workflow, including one case where implementation preceded regression test addition.
